entity.name: Andy Yang
entity.description: Independent developer based in China, building open-source multi-agent AI systems for decentralized economic governance.

projects.name: Q-EOS: Qwen Economic Agent Society
projects.description: A fully autonomous six-agent economic governance system powered by Qwen-Plus, PID control theory, and a three-layer safety framework. Q-EOS implements the Dynamic Control Buyback Mechanism (DCBM, arXiv:2601.09961) as a multi-agent architecture where Observer, Risk, PID, Policy, Governor, and Treasury agents collaborate to stabilize a token economy in real time. The system demonstrates measurable efficiency gains over single-agent baselines: +3,351 USDC treasury surplus and 7x reduction in max drawdown over 30-day controlled experiments.

plans.name: Multi-Seed Research & On-Chain Integration
plans.description: Fund multi-seed statistical experiments (10+ seeds) for academic publication, and begin on-chain execution integration with real DeFi protocols.
